title: [弩自动装填]auto reload crossbow
description:
当主手上有弩并且背包有箭时，会自动装填。并且，当手中持有弩或者弓时，左键也可以发射了
When the main hand holds a crossbow and there are arrows in the inventory, it will automatically reload. Additionally, when holding a crossbow or a bow, left-clicking can also trigger the shooting function.
body:
## auto-reload-crossbow
1.Auto-Relload System​​

When holding a crossbow in your main hand, the mod automatically checks your inventory for arrows. If ammunition is detected, it automatically performs a reloading action (by simulating a right-click). This allows you to rapidly click the left button to achieve continuous firing, similar to using a semi-automatic weapon in an FPS game (the firing interval is limited by the level of the Quick Charge enchantment). This process runs entirely on the client side and requires no server support. You can toggle this feature on or off at any time using a hotkey (default: R​​).

2.​​Left-Click Firing Optimization​​

When holding a crossbow or a bow, simply left-clicking will directly trigger the firing action. This feature also includes a toggle option, allowing you to enable or disable it in the settings based on your preference.

The mod uses an intelligent detection mechanism to ensure it does not interfere with the normal use of other items. All functions are implemented through client-side commands.

## 弩自动装填

1. 自动装填系统。当你主手持有弩时，模组会自动检测背包中是否存有箭矢。一旦确认有弹药，便会自动执行装填操作（通过模拟右键点击实现）。所以你可以像操作FPS游戏的半自动枪械一样，疯狂点击左键，达到连射的效果（连射间隔受限于快速装填附魔等级）。这一过程完全在客户端运行，无需服务器支持。可通过快捷键（默认设置为 R 键）随时开启或关闭此功能。
2. 左键发射优化。当你手持弩或弓时，只需左键点击即可直接触发发射动作。这个功能同样提供开关选项，你可根据个人习惯在设置中自定义启用或禁用。

模组采用智能判断机制，确保不会干扰其他物品的正常使用，所有功能均通过客户端指令实现。
